label: Chinese chess
prompt:
A 3:2 horizontal editorial illustration that explains ONE idea: "Xiaoxiang commits to a move in Chinese chess."

Composition: Xiaoxiang is large and confident, leaning over a traditional Chinese chessboard and carefully placing one round red chess piece with a raised front paw. Six to eight other round chess pieces rest clearly on the board as a simple battle formation. The board is a standalone square prop on a warm paper ground, viewed in a gentle three-quarter angle. Keep generous empty warm-paper space around the action. No text, no title, no labels, no logo, no UI.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot — Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. It MUST perform the move, not decorate. Follow the reference image for character value and color treatment. The mascot is a solid opaque foreground character; the chessboard and pieces must not pass through its body. The chess piece is clearly held by one paw and separated from the torso.

LINE LANGUAGE: clean black cartoon outlines with rounded corners and slightly varied hand-drawn weight. Everything is drawn by the same hand; no glossy vector edges and no technical diagram lines.

STYLE: polished children's-book plush mascot illustration, warm and soft with gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle fabric texture, and a plain warm cream paper background. No photorealism, no 3D render, no poster typography.

PALETTE: warm cream paper #faf9f5. Near-black structure ink #141413 for outlines and facial detail. Restrained warm board colors #d1aa57 and #8b3a2d. Preserve Xiaoxiang's light body, red-and-white beanie, and short red cape as the only red mascot accents.


Aspect ratio: 3:2.

label: Tank Battle game cover
prompt:
A 3:2 horizontal game-cover editorial illustration that explains ONE idea: "A lone defender holds the base against an incoming armored wave."

Composition (editorial scene): a classic top-down tank-battle arena, rendered as a single dramatic three-quarter overview. Xiaoxiang drives a large olive-green player tank in the lower-left foreground, its cannon aimed diagonally toward three smaller brick-red enemy tanks advancing through staggered burnt-orange brick walls in the upper-right. A small gold eagle base sits protected behind Xiaoxiang near the bottom center, framed by a compact U-shaped brick barricade. One bright shell crosses the open lane between tanks. The player tank and Xiaoxiang are large and confident, occupying roughly 60% of the frame; leave a calm warm-paper region in the upper-left with no text.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot -- Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. Xiaoxiang MUST actively drive the tank from an open hatch, with both arms clearly holding the controls; no prop or background line crosses or fuses into the elephant body. Preserve the reference image's elephant value structure and keep the body light enough to sit naturally on a warm paper ground.

LINE LANGUAGE: draw EVERYTHING -- Xiaoxiang, tanks, brick barricades, base, and shell -- in clean black cartoon outlines with rounded corners and slightly varied hand-drawn weight. All objects feel drawn by the same hand; avoid thin scratchy lines and hard technical diagram lines.

STYLE: polished warm children's-book plush mascot illustration. Soft fabric texture, gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle hand-drawn interior detail, friendly color, and a simple warm paper background. No photorealism, no 3D render, no glossy UI/vector style, no logo, no title, no poster typography.

PALETTE: warm cream paper #fbf7ee. Near-black #171510 for outlines and facial detail. Olive green #627a3b on the player tank. Brick red #b94a35 on enemy tanks and barricades. Gold #d1a843 only for the base, shell flash, and tiny tank markings. Keep Xiaoxiang's red-and-white beanie and red cape exactly as in the reference.

LABELS: no text, no letters, no numbers anywhere in the image.


Aspect ratio: 3:2.
